title: The Traffic Jam
content: Emma was driving to work when traffic suddenly stopped on the highway. Cars filled every lane, and nobody moved for several minutes. Some drivers looked frustrated and honked loudly. Emma turned on the radio and tried to stay calm. She sent a quick message to her manager explaining the delay. Outside, gray clouds slowly covered the sky. After almost forty minutes, the traffic finally started moving again. When Emma reached the office, she felt tired even though the workday had not started yet.
